title: Compare against both values
problem: Check whether x (which is 5) is equal to 1 or 2.

trace.checkpoint_prompt: x is 5 and the test is `x == 1 or x == 2`. After it runs, what will match be?

trace.note: match = False, a real bool. You have to compare against each value in full: `x == 1 or x == 2`. Now the result is the True/False you expected.
